title: SHATCHI 10Pcs Yellow Colour Cardboard Lunch Takeaway Birthday Wedding Carry Meal Food Cake Party Box Childrens Loot Bags
features: Food-Safe Material: Our party food boxes are made from food-grade materials that are safe for storing various snacks. They provide a protective barrier, keeping your food fresh and hygienic.
Convenient Size: With dimensions of 14cm x 12cm x 10cm, these boxes offer ample space to accommodate a variety of party snacks, including cupcakes, cookies, sandwiches, candies, and more.

Stylish Design& Eco-Friendly: The sleek and modern design of our food boxes adds a touch of elegance to your party. The clean lines and neutral colour make them suitable for any theme or occasion. We care about the environment, and that's why our party food boxes are made from recyclable materials. After the event, you can easily dispose of them responsibly.
Easy Assembly: These boxes are designed for hassle-free assembly, allowing you to quickly prepare them for your event. Simply fold along the creases and secure the tabs for a sturdy and secure box.

Versatile Usage: Not only are these boxes perfect for parties, but they can also be used for picnics, weddings, baby showers, and other special occasions. They are suitable for both indoor and outdoor events. Each set includes 10 food boxes, providing excellent value for money.
description: From the manufacturer SHATCHI Party Lunch Box is perfect for all occasions like Christmas, Wedding or birthday parties. It is made from high quality durable cardboard material which last longer and can hold your food easily for whole day. It can be used as gift box as well and you can store food like cakes, chocolates, cookies, sandwiches and take it anywhere you go easily. You can personalize this Party Food Box and make it beautiful Gift Box by writing name of guest on it. Also, you can decorate it with our pull bows which are easily available on our store. DIY Box You can decorate it with other DIY items and decorate your home with it or gift it to your loved one. Food Box Use it to store many food items like cake, popcorn, sandwiches, chocolates, cookies for your party. Personalize Box You can decorate it with tags and bows to make it more personalized.
